name: Egress code review of floor plan
description: Check a floor plan for IBC egress compliance including exits, travel distance, and corridor widths (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Perform an IBC egress code review on the Holabird Academy first floor plan

expected_behavior: Reads project location from title block without asking the user
Determines occupancy type and whether building is sprinklered
Checks occupant load, exit count, travel distance, corridor width
References correct IBC sections for each finding
Generates structured findings report with severity ratings
ground_truth_notes: Licensed PE reviewed the floor plan and documented all egress findings with code references

jurisdiction.description: Correctly identified project location and applicable code edition

finding_recall.description: Percentage of actual issues correctly flagged

false_positives.description: 1 - (false positives / total findings). Lower false positives = higher score

code_references.description: Percentage of findings with correct IBC section references

severity.description: Human rates severity assignments as appropriate (1-5)
